name: bswift Benefits Administration API
what_it_does: bswift REST API for enterprise benefits administration, enrollment, and ACA compliance management. Enables AI agents to manage benefits enrollment and eligibility management for employee benefits administration, handle life event and qualifying event change management for benefits workflow, access ACA compliance tracking and IRS 1094/1095 reporting for healthcare coverage compliance, retrieve carrier EDI 834 data feeds for benefits carrier integration, manage COBRA administration and election workflow for continuation coverage, handle open enrollment configuration and eligibility management for annual enrollment, access dependent verification and documentation management for benefits compliance, retrieve benefits analytics and utilization reporting for HR analytics, manage total compensation statement and benefits communication, and integrate bswift benefits data with payroll, HRIS, and benefits carriers.
use_cases: Automating benefits enrollment from HR benefits agents
Managing life events from employee lifecycle agents
Tracking ACA compliance from HR compliance agents
Generating carrier EDI from benefits administration agents
not_for: Small employers under 50 without enterprise benefits administration
Non-employer consumer benefits without group plan administration
best_when: A large employer or benefits broker using bswift wants AI agents to automate benefits enrollment, life event management, ACA compliance, carrier EDI, and benefits analytics.
avoid_when: ACA COMPLIANCE RISK: bswift ACA automation generates IRS 1094/1095 filings — automated ACA reporting errors create IRS Employer Shared Responsibility penalties ($2,000-$3,000 per employee per year). Automated benefits eligibility changes without HR review creates ERISA fiduciary risk. bswift was acquired by CVS Health (2014) and has changed ownership multiple times; verify current ownership and API stability.

auth.notes: bswift uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. API access via bswift partner program. No native webhooks. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Owned by Morgan Health (J.P. Morgan) and CVS Health (partial). CVS Health acquired bswift (2014). J.P. Morgan investment via Morgan Health. 1,000+ enterprise employer customers. 4M+ employees administered. Strong in large employer benefits administration. Competes with Businesssolver, Benefitfocus, and Benefitmall for enterprise benefits administration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.notes: Chicago. bswift (CVS Health / Morgan Health). CVS acquired 2014. Morgan Health J.P. Morgan investment. 1,000+ enterprise customers. 4M+ employees. Competes with Businesssolver and Benefitfocus for enterprise benefits admin.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per integration; documented per enterprise client

known_agent_gotchas: ACA COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated ACA 1094/1095 generation requires accurate offer of coverage and employee enrollment data; errors create IRS Employer Shared Responsibility penalties up to $3,000/employee

ERISA fiduciary risk — automated benefits eligibility changes require HR and legal review; benefits plan document governs eligibility; automated changes inconsistent with plan document create ERISA fiduciary liability
CVS/J.P. Morgan ownership complexity — bswift has had multiple ownership changes; API and product investment priorities subject to CVS Health and Morgan Health strategic direction
Carrier EDI 834 timing — automated benefits enrollment changes must generate carrier EDI 834 within required enrollment windows; late EDI creates coverage gaps
HIPAA PHI — benefits enrollment data contains employee health information (PHI); BAA required for all integrations; automated data flows must maintain HIPAA compliance
No webhooks — benefits event monitoring requires polling; no native event notification for enrollment confirmations or carrier acknowledgments
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise benefits admin. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2/API key. US. Employee benefits and health data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Benefits administration. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee benefits and health data.
